title: dracocephalum veitchii
intro: Dracocephalum veitchii, also known as the Veitch's Dragonhead or Dragon's Head, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Dracocephalum veitchii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
